case_title: ROGERIO SERODIO VS. THE GOOD JOB BROTHERS JANITORIAL, LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-15-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE GOOD JOB BROTHERS JANITORIAL, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT THE GOOD JOB BROTHERS JANITORIAL, LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $676.50 FILED BY SERODIO, ROGERIO AS TO DEFENDANT THE GOOD JOB BROTHERS JANITORIAL, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERODIO, ROGERIO AS TO DEFENDANT THE GOOD JOB BROTHERS JANITORIAL, LLC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERODIO, ROGERIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE GOOD JOB BROTHERS JANITORIAL, LLC $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $140.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS AN AWARD OF DAMAGES FOR NON-ELECTRICAL PROPERTY. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT ELECTRICAL DEVICES WERE UNDER THE CUSTODY AND CONTROL OF PLAINTIFF'S LANDLORD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
